dj_text: THIS is That Pirate Bot DJ Radio! The Rock says... listen! Mmm, Haddaway - What Is Love (Medieval Style | Bardcore). Smooth transition to Vicetone & Tony Igy - Astronomia (Medieval Style | Bardcore). Small but mighty. 5 more in the tank.
commercial_text: Welcome to That Pirate Bot DJ Radio, where we never stop singing our medieval anthems!
hijack_text: Blast off on Mirror Wave, where drones DJ for democracy!
recovery_text: We're back. That was NOT a crossover event. That was a dimensional bleed.
